# CWE-41 positive: path equivalence via dot segments (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-41-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
	"strings"
)

// CWE-41 Improper Resolution of Path Equivalence
// Vulnerable line: rejects ".." but allows "./" and "//" aliases.
func FetchMemo(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	root := "/srv/memos"
	rel := r.URL.Query().Get("path")
	if strings.Contains(rel, "..") {
		http.Error(w, "bad path", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	full := filepath.Join(root, rel)
	body, err := os.ReadFile(full)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "missing", http.StatusNotFound)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "text/plain")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_, _ = w.Write(body)
}
